code:
type OrderStatus =
  | Pending
  | Paid
  | Shipped
  | Delivered
  | Cancelled

fn next(_ status: OrderStatus, _ event: String) -> OrderStatus
  match event
  when "cancel"
    OrderStatus.Cancelled
  when "pay"
    match status
    when Pending
      OrderStatus.Paid
    when _
      status
    end
  when "ship"
    match status
    when Paid
      OrderStatus.Shipped
    when _
      status
    end
  when "deliver"
    match status
    when Shipped
      OrderStatus.Delivered
    when _
      status
    end
  when _
    status
  end
end

fn name_of(_ status: OrderStatus) -> String
  match status
  when Pending
    "Pending"
  when Paid
    "Paid"
  when Shipped
    "Shipped"
  when Delivered
    "Delivered"
  when Cancelled
    "Cancelled"
  end
end

mut status = OrderStatus.Pending
let events = ["pay", "ship", "unknown", "deliver"]
for e in events
  status = next(status, e)
  println(name_of(status))
end
